notes: Miniature pocket/field converter; no rack units (third-party shelves can rack-mount multiples). USB port is physically a Mini-B connector, mapped to usb-micro as the closest vocabulary match. Power connector is a threaded locking coaxial barrel (not a standard unthreaded barrel), mapped to dc-barrel; accepts +5V to +32V DC.

ports.name: SDI Out 1
ports.note: 3G/HD/SD-SDI; configurable as 1-to-4 DA or paired with SDI Out 2 as loop/scaled

ports.name: SDI Out 2
ports.note: 3G/HD/SD-SDI; configurable as 1-to-4 DA or paired with SDI Out 1 as loop/scaled

ports.name: SDI Out 3
ports.note: 3G/HD/SD-SDI; configurable as 1-to-4 DA or paired with SDI Out 4 as loop/scaled

ports.name: SDI Out 4
ports.note: 3G/HD/SD-SDI; configurable as 1-to-4 DA or paired with SDI Out 3 as loop/scaled

ports.name: USB
ports.note: Physically USB Mini-B; firmware updates and control software

ports.name: DC Power In
ports.note: Threaded locking coaxial barrel; accepts +5V to +32V DC
